player.rule: keep the hero silhouette on the hand-curated paperdoll path

portal.rule: keep the traversal portal on a warm procedural placeholder until final cute portal art lands

echo_box.rule: keep the box echo as a reference/asset-gap prop until a final cute variant lands

echo_spring_flower.rule: keep the spring-flower echo as a reference/asset-gap prop until a final cute variant lands

echo_bomb_bug.rule: keep the bomb-bug echo as a reference/asset-gap prop until a final cute variant lands

boss_shield_closed.rule: pair with boss_shield_open as a temporary shield system

boss_shield_open.rule: pair with boss_shield_closed as a temporary shield system

projectile_arrow.rule: temporary projectile prefab binding until final cute projectile art lands

common_enemy.rule: enemy body may not use generated art as a first-release anchor

hud_top_bar.rule: main HUD may not use AI skins directly; keep one warm procedural renderer

objective_card.rule: main HUD may not use AI skins directly; keep one warm procedural renderer

controls_card.rule: main HUD may not use AI skins directly; keep one warm procedural renderer

touch_attack_button.rule: touch controls may not use AI skins directly; keep procedural rounded buttons

touch_summon_button.rule: touch controls may not use AI skins directly; keep procedural rounded buttons

touch_respawn_button.rule: touch controls may not use AI skins directly; keep procedural rounded buttons

touch_echo_button.rule: touch controls may not use AI skins directly; keep procedural rounded buttons

pause_button.rule: pause touch control may not use AI skins directly; keep procedural rounded buttons

checkpoint.rule: keep checkpoint as a warm procedural placeholder until final cute checkpoint art lands

barrier_closed.rule: puzzle barrier may not use generated art as a first-release anchor

barrier_open.rule: puzzle barrier may not use generated art as a first-release anchor

breakable_target.rule: breakable targets stay procedural until final cute affordance art lands

pickup_relic.rule: room reward stays procedural until final cute reward art lands

environment_dungeon_floor_family.rule: family selector for dungeon floor materials

environment_dungeon_wall_family.rule: family selector for dungeon wall materials

environment_dungeon_prop_family.rule: family selector for dungeon prop materials
